ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the category image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the product image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the product (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the variant */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the variant */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the variant */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the variant */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the variant is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was last updated */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the variant in grams */,
  "additional_images" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of additional image paths */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the product variant details (e.g., en, es, fr) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size */,
  "asian_size" TEXT /* Asian size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "length_inches" REAL /* Length in inches */,
  "length_cm" REAL /* Length in centimeters */,
  "width_inches" REAL /* Width in inches */,
  "width_cm" REAL /* Width in centimeters */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the measurement is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  "chest_inches" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inches" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_inches" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the inventory entry is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, inventory manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user (e.g., en, es, fr) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product accessed */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variant accessed */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the revenue */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sale has been refunded */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  "currency_exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for the sale if the currency is different from the base currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
